# nn-visual.com

A free interactive visualizer for neural networks and transformer attention. Built by Grant Wasserman to help students understand how modern machine learning models work.

## Pages

- [Neural Network Visualizer](https://nn-visual.com/): Interactive tool for understanding forward and backpropagation. Configurable architecture, real-time training visualization, written explanation of how neural networks learn.
- [Transformer Visualization](https://nn-visual.com/transformer): Interactive exploration of self-attention. BERT attention patterns on real sentences, user-provided input, multi-head attention comparison.

## Key concepts covered

- Neural networks: architecture, weights, activations
- Backpropagation and gradient descent
- Self-attention: queries, keys, values
- Multi-head attention
- Transformer architecture
- Real-world phenomena: anaphora resolution, subject-verb agreement, long-range dependencies

## About

Built by Grant Wasserman (https://grantwasserman.com), an graduate student at the University of Nebraska–Lincoln studying CS and math.
